Class JMLInfoExtractor

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.JMLInfoExtractor
public final class JMLInfoExtractor extends Object
Helper class used by the JML translation. Provides methods that look for certain keywords (such as "pure") in comments, and that help in desugaring such keywords.

    • JMLInfoExtractor

      public JMLInfoExtractor()

  • Method Details

    • parseMethod

      public static MethodDeclaration.JMLModifiers parseMethod(MethodDeclaration methodDeclaration)
      Parses a modifiers of a method
      Parameters:
      methodDeclaration - the method declaration
      Returns:
      modifiers

    • hasJMLModifier

      public static boolean hasJMLModifier(FieldDeclaration fd, String modifiers)

    • isPureByDefault

      public static boolean isPureByDefault(KeYJavaType t)
      Returns true iff the given type is specified as pure, i.e. all methods and constructors are by default specified "pure"

      If t is not a reference type, false is returned.

    • isStrictlyPureByDefault

      public static boolean isStrictlyPureByDefault(KeYJavaType t)
      Returns true iff the given type is specified as pure, i.e. all methods and constructors are by default specified "strictly_pure"

      If t is not a reference type, false is returned.

    • isNullableByDefault

      public static boolean isNullableByDefault(KeYJavaType t)
      Returns true if the given type is specified as nullable, i.e. all fields and method parameters are by default specified "nullable"

      If t is not a reference type, false is returned.

    • parseClass

      public static TypeDeclaration.JMLModifiers parseClass(TypeDeclaration td)
      Parses modifiers of a type
      Parameters:
      td - the type declaration
      Returns:
      modifiers

    • isNullable

      public static boolean isNullable(String fieldName, TypeDeclaration td)
      Returns true, if containingClass is a reference Type and has a field declaration with name fieldName, which is explicitly or implicitly declared "nullable"

    • parameterIsNullable

      public static boolean parameterIsNullable(IProgramMethod pm, int pos)
      Returns true iff the pos-th parameter of the given method is declared "nullable" (implicitly or explicitly).

    • parameterIsNullable

      public static boolean parameterIsNullable(IProgramMethod pm, ParameterDeclaration pd)
      Returns true iff the parameter of the given method is declared "nullable" (implicitly or explicitly). Warning: weird things may happen if the parameter doesn't belong to the method.

    • resultIsNullable

      public static boolean resultIsNullable(IProgramMethod pm)

    • isPure

      public static boolean isPure(IProgramMethod pm)
      Returns true iff the given method is specified "pure".

    • isHelper

      public static boolean isHelper(IProgramMethod pm)
      Returns true iff the given method is specified "helper".

    • isStrictlyPure

      public static boolean isStrictlyPure(IProgramMethod pm)
      Returns true iff the given method is specified "strictly_pure" or the containing type is specified so.

    • getSpecMathMode

      public static @Nullable SpecMathMode getSpecMathMode(@NonNull KeYJavaType t)
      Returns the spec math mode of this type

    • getSpecMathModeOrDefault

      public static @NonNull SpecMathMode getSpecMathModeOrDefault(@NonNull KeYJavaType t)
      Returns the spec math mode of this type or the default

      Returns the spec math mode of this method

      Returns the spec math mode of this method
